name: RateGain Travel Technology API
what_it_does: RateGain REST API for hotel revenue management and distribution technology platform. Enables AI agents to access competitor rate intelligence and parity monitoring, manage OTA rate distribution and availability, retrieve demand forecasting data, sync rates across channels, monitor rate parity violations, access booking pace data, and integrate revenue management data with PMS and channel manager systems.
use_cases: Monitoring competitor pricing and rate parity from revenue intelligence agents
Managing rate distribution across OTA channels from channel management agents
Retrieving demand forecasting data from revenue optimization agents
Detecting and alerting on rate parity violations from compliance monitoring agents
not_for: Vacation rental without hotel chain or independent hotel revenue management
Airlines without hotel-specific rate parity and OTA distribution
Small independent hotels without multi-channel distribution complexity
best_when: A hotel or hotel group wants AI agents to automate rate intelligence monitoring, competitor pricing analysis, channel rate management, and rate parity compliance tracking.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Rate distribution errors can result in revenue loss or OTA contract violations. Automated rate changes must be validated against minimum/maximum pricing guardrails.

auth.notes: RateGain uses API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication. Property-level credentials. Partner program for PMS and revenue management system integrations. Separate credentials per RateGain product.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — travel technology enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-property annual pricing; enterprise pricing for hotel groups; NSE-listed Indian company
pricing.notes: Indian company (Noida), NSE and BSE listed. 30,000+ hotel customers globally. Strong in OTA channel management and rate intelligence. Acquired multiple companies including DHISCO, BCV, and Myhotelshop.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented with enterprise access

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Rate distribution errors affect OTA contracts and revenue — validate pricing guardrails
No public MCP server — REST API with partner program
Indian company — multi-region data residency (US/EU/IN) — verify compliance requirements
No webhooks — requires polling for rate parity alerts and competitor data
Multiple acquired product lines — API may vary by product module
No granular scopes — verify access control per integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Hotel rate and revenue management data. GDPR, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. Multi-region data residency. Indian public company.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hotel rate and distribution data. GDPR, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. Multi-region data residency (US/EU/IN).
